arts.ttl: Wolves sack Gary O'Neil before Tottenham match as Ange Postecoglou action plan impacted
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are now due to take on a Wolverhampton Wanderers team with a new head coach in their final match of the year, after the Midlands outfit sacked Gary O'Neil following their late defeat to Ipswich Town . Tottenham are one of three teams yet to play Wolves this season and are due to do so in their final match of the calendar year.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane names the one Tottenham player he would actually love to bring to Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Imagine the Tottenham star and Harry Kane in the same team again 🥵

arts.ttl: Tottenham lining up move for 18-year-old Argentine prodigy
arts.sum: Preston North End attacker Felipe Rodriguez-Gentile has been linked with a move away from the club. The 18-year-old Argentine attacker is reportedly a target for Premier League clubs like Tottenham Hotspur, Ipswich Town and Nottingham Forest, as per Fichajes. He has previously been linked with heavyweights like Liverpool and Manchester United. Rodriguez-Gentile is highly rated […] The post Tottenham lining up move for 18-year-old Argentine prodigy appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham drop early quadruple Southampton team news hint as Postecoglou has Man Utd decision
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have hinted that Dejan Kulusevski and Dominic Solanke will return to the team at Southampton after their contributions as substitutes against the Rangers. Solanke had played the full 90 minutes in all but one of the team's matches since the November international break, only missing the draw with Fulham due to illness.

arts.ttl: Tottenham looking to raid English club for 25-year-old due to injury crisis
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are one of the clubs looking to sign the Leeds United defender Pascal Struijk. The 25-year-old Dutch international defender has done quite well in the Championship and Tottenham are following him closely. They need to add more depth to their defensive unit and the 25-year-old would be a quality addition. arts.ttl: Man United to battle it out with Tottenham for 28-year-old South American
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur have been linked with a move for the Botafogo goalkeeper John Victor. The player’s agent has revealed to Football Insider that the 28-year-old wants to join a club in the Premier League, and it will be interesting to see if Manchester United and Tottenham are prepared to submit an offer […] The post Man United to battle it out with Tottenham for 28-year-old South American appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou tells 'bruised egos' to fight for Spurs
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has demanded his Tottenham Hotspur players show more fight and says he has no time for "bruised egos", after describing Timo Werner’s performance in their 1-1 draw with Rangers "unacceptable". Postecoglou says his criticism after the UEFA Europa League draw in Glasgow extended beyond Werner, as he asked for more from his senior players this weekend following four defeats from seven Premier League matches.

arts.ttl: Liverpool injury, suspension list and return dates for Southampton: Robertson, Tsimikas, Konate
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Liverpool's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's EFL Cup quarter-final with Southampton.

arts.ttl: Tottenham offered the chance to sign £13 million-rated South American
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are looking to improve their defensive unit with the signing of the South American defender Omar Alderete. The Paraguayan international is on the radar of Wolves, Leicester City and Crystal Palace as well.
